articles.title: The shocking origin of human eyes traces back to an ancient “cyclops”
articles.description: A bizarre, cyclops-like creature from nearly 600 million years ago may hold the key to how your eyes—and even your sleep cycle—evolved. Scientists have discovered that all vertebrates, including humans, trace their vision back to a single light-sensitive “median eye” perched atop a worm-like ancestor’s head. As this ancient animal shifted from a sedentary to a more active lifestyle, it lost and then reinvented its vision, eventually giving rise to the paired, image-forming eyes we rely on today.

The party anticipates further gains by year-end, nearing a crucial two-thirds majority.

articles.title: This one change to your exercise routine could add years to your life
articles.description: Mixing up your workouts might be the real secret to a longer life. Long-term research tracking over 100,000 people for more than three decades suggests that doing a variety of physical activities—rather than just more of the same—can significantly lower the risk of death. Interestingly, the benefits don’t keep rising endlessly; they seem to level off after a certain point, hinting at a “sweet spot” of activity.

articles.title: Raghav Chadha Breaks Silence On Switch From AAP To BJP
articles.description: Chadha also addressed supporters who feared his priorities would change under the BJP.

articles.title: Seven AAP Rajya Sabha MPs Officially Merge With BJP
articles.description: Rajya Sabha Chairman C P Radhakrishnan accepted the merger of seven AAP MPs with the BJP, increasing BJP's strength in the Upper House to 113 and reducing AAP to three members.

articles.title: 7 ex-AAP MPs formally join BJP; NDA strength in Rajya Sabha climbs to 148, AAP down to 3
articles.description: Seven Aam Aadmi Party Rajya Sabha MPs have officially joined the Bharatiya Janata Party, bolstering the NDA's numbers in the Upper House. This move, facilitated by the anti-defection law's provision for two-thirds party mergers, sees the BJP's strength increase significantly. The party anticipates further gains by year-end, nearing a crucial two-thirds majority.
